prompt: I need to back up my entire ~/Documents folder (about 2GB with nested folders) to MEGA encrypted storage. What's the fastest and cleanest way to do this? I want to be able to verify the backup worked.

assertions.name: recommends_mega_put_c
assertions.description: Response recommends mega-put -c for recursive folder upload

assertions.name: includes_verification_commands
assertions.description: Response includes commands to verify backup (mega-ls, file counts, sizes)

assertions.name: mentions_encryption
assertions.description: Response explains zero-knowledge encryption or that MEGA handles encryption automatically

assertions.name: provides_time_estimate
assertions.description: Response gives realistic time estimate for upload and verification

assertions.name: addresses_nested_folders
assertions.description: Response explicitly handles nested folder structure preservation

assertions.name: is_practical_and_complete
assertions.description: Response is production-ready with step-by-step instructions
